entry.title: Préavis de grève de la CGT Cheminots pour le 17 septembre : ‘J’ai du mal à comprendre’, réagit le ministre délégué aux Transports

link.title: Préavis de grève de la CGT Cheminots pour le 17 septembre : ‘J’ai du mal à comprendre’, réagit le ministre délégué aux Transports

entry.content: "C’est un peu, j’ai l’impression, une grève par habitude et c’est dommage", déplore Jean-Baptiste Djebbari.
entry.summary: "C’est un peu, j’ai l’impression, une grève par habitude et c’est dommage", déplore Jean-Baptiste Djebbari.

entry.title: A DARK PATH Trailer (2020) Monster Horror

entry.title: John Snow, le Sherlock Holmes du choléra d’après Sidonie Bonnec et le Pr Jean-Noël Fabiani

link.title: John Snow, le Sherlock Holmes du choléra d’après Sidonie Bonnec et le Pr Jean-Noël Fabiani

entry.content:
Dans Minute Papillon !, Sidonie Bonnec revient sur l’enquête qui a permis dès 1854 d’isoler la souche du choléra.
Le Pr Jean-Noël Fabiani nous présente John Snow, un médecin-enquêteur qui va utiliser un principe bien connu aujourd’hui : la géolocalisation.
Ecoutez cette émission en intégralité sur notre site :
Retrouvez "Minute Papillon !" sur France Bleu entre 14 et 15 heures ou sur FranceBleu.fr :
entry.summary: Dans Minute Papillon !, Sidonie Bonnec revient sur l’enquête qui a permis dès 1854 d’isoler la souche du choléra. Le Pr Jean-Noël Fabiani nous présente John Snow, un médecin-enquêteur qui va utiliser un principe bien connu aujourd’hui : la géolocalisation. Ecoutez cette émission en intégralité sur notre site : Retrouvez "Minute Papillon !" sur France Bleu entre 14 et 15 heures ou sur FranceBleu.fr :

entry.title: Kohli Team ಮೊದಲು ಎದುರಿಸಲಿರೋ ತಂಡ ಯಾವ್ದು ಗೊತ್ತಾ Oneindia Kannada

link.title: Kohli Team ಮೊದಲು ಎದುರಿಸಲಿರೋ ತಂಡ ಯಾವ್ದು ಗೊತ್ತಾ Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಇಂಡಿಯನ್ ಪ್ರೀಮಿಯರ್ ಲೀಗ್ 13ನೇ ಆವೃತ್ತಿ ಆರಂಭಕ್ಕೆ ದಿನಗಣನೆ ಆರಂಭವಾಗಿದೆ. ಯುನೈಟೆಡ್ ಅರಬ್ ಎಮಿರೇಟ್ಸ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿ ಸೆಪ್ಟೆಂಬರ್ 19ರಿಂದ ನವೆಂಬರ್ 10ರವರೆಗೆ ಭಾರತದ ಅದ್ದೂರಿ ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟ್ ಟೂರ್ನಿ ನಡೆಯಲಿದೆ. ಐಪಿಎಲ್ 2020 ಅಧಿಕೃತ ವೇಳಾಪಟ್ಟಿ ಇಂದು ಪ್ರಕಟವಾಗಿದೆ. ರಾಯಲ್ ಚಾಲೆಂಜರ್ಸ್ ಬೆಂಗಳೂರು(ಆರ್ ಸಿಬಿ) ತಂಡದ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣ ವೇಳಾಪಟ್ಟಿ ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ.
#IPL #2020 #Schedule
Royal Challengers Bangalore will begin their IPL 13 campaign against Sunrisers Hyderabad on September 21 at Dubai. The BCCI released the much-awaited full schedule on Sunday.
entry.summary: ಇಂಡಿಯನ್ ಪ್ರೀಮಿಯರ್ ಲೀಗ್ 13ನೇ ಆವೃತ್ತಿ ಆರಂಭಕ್ಕೆ ದಿನಗಣನೆ ಆರಂಭವಾಗಿದೆ. ಯುನೈಟೆಡ್ ಅರಬ್ ಎಮಿರೇಟ್ಸ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿ ಸೆಪ್ಟೆಂಬರ್ 19ರಿಂದ ನವೆಂಬರ್ 10ರವರೆಗೆ ಭಾರತದ ಅದ್ದೂರಿ ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟ್ ಟೂರ್ನಿ ನಡೆಯಲಿದೆ. ಐಪಿಎಲ್ 2020 ಅಧಿಕೃತ ವೇಳಾಪಟ್ಟಿ ಇಂದು ಪ್ರಕಟವಾಗಿದೆ. ರಾಯಲ್ ಚಾಲೆಂಜರ್ಸ್ ಬೆಂಗಳೂರು(ಆರ್ ಸಿಬಿ) ತಂಡದ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣ ವೇಳಾಪಟ್ಟಿ ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ. #IPL #2020 #Schedule Royal Challengers Bangalore will begin their IPL 13 campaign against Sunrisers Hyderabad on September 21 at Dubai. The BCCI released the much-awaited full schedule on Sunday.

entry.title: Guy Gets Hit in Eye With Ball Post Golf Swing Fail

link.title: Guy Gets Hit in Eye With Ball Post Golf Swing Fail

entry.content: This guy was playing golf and swung his golf club to hit the ball. Unfortunately, it didn’t go as planned, and the ball hit him in the eye. He looked hurt as he grabbed his affected eye in agony.
entry.summary: This guy was playing golf and swung his golf club to hit the ball. Unfortunately, it didn’t go as planned, and the ball hit him in the eye. He looked hurt as he grabbed his affected eye in agony.

entry.title: Saraab Episode 3 HUM TV Drama 3 September 2020

link.title: Saraab Episode 3 HUM TV Drama 3 September 2020

entry.content:
Saraab, Episode 3, Official HD Video - 3 September 2020
After Ishq Zahe Naseeb and Ye Dil Mera, Saraab also raises an important mental health issue which revolves around patients suffering from ‘schizophrenia’. Directed by Mohsin Talat and written by Edison Idrees Masih, the drama stars Sami Khan, Sonya Hussayn, Nazish Jahangir, and Ghana Ali in pivotal roles.
Starring
Sami Khan, Sonya Hussain, Auranzeb Laghari, Farida Shabbir, Ghana Ali, Nazish Jehangir, Sajid Shah & Others.
Directed By: Mohsin Talat
Written By: Edison Idrees
Produced By: Moomal Entertainment & MD Productions
#Saraab #SamiKhan #SonyaHussain #AuranzebLaghari #GhanaAli #HUMTV #Drama
entry.summary: Saraab, Episode 3, Official HD Video - 3 September 2020 After Ishq Zahe Naseeb and Ye Dil Mera, Saraab also raises an important mental health issue which revolves around patients suffering from ‘schizophrenia’. Directed by Mohsin Talat and written by Edison Idrees Masih, the drama stars Sami Khan, Sonya Hussayn, Nazish Jahangir, and Ghana Ali in pivotal roles. Starring Sami Khan, Sonya Hussain, Auranzeb Laghari, Farida Shabbir, Ghana Ali, Nazish Jehangir, Sajid Shah & Others. Directed By: Mohsin Talat Written By: Edison Idrees Produced By: Moomal Entertainment & MD Productions #Saraab #SamiKhan #SonyaHussain #AuranzebLaghari #GhanaAli #HUMTV #Drama

entry.title: Bangladesh Rohingya Protests Shared By Tarek Fatah as Video From Kolkata

link.title: Bangladesh Rohingya Protests Shared By Tarek Fatah as Video From Kolkata

entry.content:
Recently Canadian journalist and serial fake news offender Tarek Fatah tweeted a video saying that ‘Islam Zindabad’ slogans were raised in Kolkata. However, Team WebQoof found that the video is actually of a protest in Bangladesh against killing and torture of Rohingya Muslims.
Video: The Quint
Music: Big Bang Fuzz
entry.summary: Recently Canadian journalist and serial fake news offender Tarek Fatah tweeted a video saying that ‘Islam Zindabad’ slogans were raised in Kolkata. However, Team WebQoof found that the video is actually of a protest in Bangladesh against killing and torture of Rohingya Muslims. Video: The Quint Music: Big Bang Fuzz

entry.title: FODEN Y GREENWOOD, EXPULSADOS TRAS METER MUJERES AL HOTEL DE CONCENTRACIÓN

link.title: FODEN Y GREENWOOD, EXPULSADOS TRAS METER MUJERES AL HOTEL DE CONCENTRACIÓN

entry.content:
Phil Foden y Mason Greenwood fueron expulsados de la concentración de Inglaterra este lunes, luego de que fueran exhibidos en redes sociales por meter a dos mujeres al hotel de concentración, rompiendo las reglas de seguridad por el Covid-19.
En la conferencia de prensa de este lunes, Gareth Southgate confirmó que ambos futbolistas fueron separados del plantel y viajarán de vuelta a Inglaterra.
De esto y más entérate en el Top 5 de Récord.
Suscríbete a nuestro canal en:
Para más noticias de tus deportes favoritos entra a:
Síguenos en nuestras redes sociales: Facebook:
Instagram:
Tik Tok:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Phil Foden y Mason Greenwood fueron expulsados de la concentración de Inglaterra este lunes, luego de que fueran exhibidos en redes sociales por meter a dos mujeres al hotel de concentración, rompiendo las reglas de seguridad por el Covid-19. En la conferencia de prensa de este lunes, Gareth Southgate confirmó que ambos futbolistas fueron separados del plantel y viajarán de vuelta a Inglaterra. De esto y más entérate en el Top 5 de Récord. Suscríbete a nuestro canal en: Para más noticias de tus deportes favoritos entra a: Síguenos en nuestras redes sociales: Facebook: Instagram: Tik Tok: Twitter:

entry.title: Una verdadera mujer maravilla: la historia de vida de Gal Gadot

link.title: Una verdadera mujer maravilla: la historia de vida de Gal Gadot

entry.content: Luego de estar en las Fuerzas de Defensa de Israel, estudiar Derecho y Relaciones Internacionales, participar en Miss Universo y ahora interpretar a una de las superheroínas más famosas del mundo, nos queda claro que Gal Gadot es mucho más que una simple actriz.
entry.summary: Luego de estar en las Fuerzas de Defensa de Israel, estudiar Derecho y Relaciones Internacionales, participar en Miss Universo y ahora interpretar a una de las superheroínas más famosas del mundo, nos queda claro que Gal Gadot es mucho más que una simple actriz.

entry.title: The new Honda Civic Type R Preview

link.title: The new Honda Civic Type R Preview

entry.content:
Honda took the wraps off the latest iteration of the Civic Type R, the race-ready Civic Type R TC race car from Honda Performance Development (HPD). The Type R TC is designed as a turn-key solution for professional racers, and for skilled Type R enthusiasts who wish to transition from track time in a stock Type R to a fully built race car. Eligible for SRO TC Americas Touring Car competition, the all-new Type R TC race car is available to Honda Racing Line members with racing licenses exclusively through HPD at a manufacturer’s price of $89,900. The specially outfitted Type R joins the TCA-class Civic Si and TCR-class Type R in HPD’s portfolio of Civic-based, turn-key racing machines.
Designed specifically for TC-class competition, the Civic Type R TC was developed and tested in-house by HPD engineers as a modified version of the production Civic Type R designed exclusively for track use, with final assembly done by Gradient Racing in Austin, Texas. HPD engineers developed and tested the Civic Type R TC race car in-house, drawing on experience gained from production car and race vehicle engineering, including development of the HPD Civic Si TCA race car. The HPD-developed Civic Type R race car begins life as a body in white from Honda’s Swindon, England, plant, and uses its road- and track-proven 2.0-liter VTEC Turbo engine supplied by the Honda of America Mfg. engine plant in Anna, Ohio, producing between 270 and 330 horsepower, depending on the series application.
entry.summary: Honda took the wraps off the latest iteration of the Civic Type R, the race-ready Civic Type R TC race car from Honda Performance Development (HPD). The Type R TC is designed as a turn-key solution for professional racers, and for skilled Type R enthusiasts who wish to transition from track time in a stock Type R to a fully built race car. Eligible for SRO TC Americas Touring Car competition, the all-new Type R TC race car is available to Honda Racing Line members with racing licenses exclusively through HPD at a manufacturer’s price of $89,900. The specially outfitted Type R joins the TCA-class Civic Si and TCR-class Type R in HPD’s portfolio of Civic-based, turn-key racing machines. Designed specifically for TC-class competition, the Civic Type R TC was developed and tested in-house by HPD engineers as a modified version of the production Civic Type R designed exclusively for track use, with final assembly done by Gradient Racing in Austin, Texas. HPD engineers developed and tested the Civic Type R TC race car in-house, drawing on experience gained from production car and race vehicle engineering, including development of the HPD Civic Si TCA race car. The HPD-developed Civic Type R race car begins life as a body in white from Honda’s Swindon, England, plant, and uses its road- and track-proven 2.0-liter VTEC Turbo engine supplied by the Honda of America Mfg. engine plant in Anna, Ohio, producing between 270 and 330 horsepower, depending on the series application.

entry.title: Health or aesthetics? DOH says dolomite dust can cause respiratory problems

link.title: Health or aesthetics? DOH says dolomite dust can cause respiratory problems

entry.content:
The Department of Health (DOH) said on Monday, September 7, that dolomite sand, which started filling the Manila Baywalk, could pose health risks.
Read:
entry.summary: The Department of Health (DOH) said on Monday, September 7, that dolomite sand, which started filling the Manila Baywalk, could pose health risks. Read:

entry.title: ‘J’ai infiltré la police’, le témoignage - 04 09

link.title: ‘J’ai infiltré la police’, le témoignage - 04 09

entry.content:
Ce vendredi, "Flic", un livre inédit de Valentin Gendrot sort en librairie. Dans cet ouvrage, le journaliste qui s’est infiltré dans la police raconte son parcours. Violences, bavures, conditions de travail souvent déplorables, il nous fait découvrir les réalités de la profession. Ce document est-il en cohérence avec le quotidien des policiers ? Est-il caricatural ? - Avec: Marcel Mennecier, ancien major du commissariat du 18e arrondissement de Paris. Sarah-Lou Cohen, cheffe du service police-justice de BFMTV. – Focus Première, du vendredi 4 septembre 2020, sur BFMTV.
Focus première est le lieu de débat et d’approfondissement de "Première Edition" : chaque jour en direct, invités et experts répondent à la question du jour sur le plateau de Christophe Delay et Adeline François.
BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.
entry.summary: Ce vendredi, "Flic", un livre inédit de Valentin Gendrot sort en librairie. Dans cet ouvrage, le journaliste qui s’est infiltré dans la police raconte son parcours. Violences, bavures, conditions de travail souvent déplorables, il nous fait découvrir les réalités de la profession. Ce document est-il en cohérence avec le quotidien des policiers ? Est-il caricatural ? - Avec: Marcel Mennecier, ancien major du commissariat du 18e arrondissement de Paris. Sarah-Lou Cohen, cheffe du service police-justice de BFMTV. – Focus Première, du vendredi 4 septembre 2020, sur BFMTV. Focus première est le lieu de débat et d’approfondissement de "Première Edition" : chaque jour en direct, invités et experts répondent à la question du jour sur le plateau de Christophe Delay et Adeline François. BFMTV, 1ère chaine d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.

entry.title: Gare du Nord : Que sait-on de l’agression au couteau d’hier soir qui a provoqué un mouvement de panique ?

link.title: Gare du Nord : Que sait-on de l’agression au couteau d’hier soir qui a provoqué un mouvement de panique ?

entry.content:
Un homme muni d’une arme blanche a grièvement blessé une personne avant de prendre la fuite, dimanche vers 17h, à la gare du Nord à Paris, a appris l’AFP auprès de la préfecture de police de Paris. La victime est de nationalité afghane et demandeur d’asile en France, a indiqué une source policière. Elle a été transportée en milieu hospitalier avec un «pronostic vital engagé», selon les pompiers. Les motifs de cette agression n’étaient pas connus dimanche en début de soirée, selon la préfecture.
Selon Le Parisien, la victime est un demandeur d’asile afghan né en 1988 qui attendait son train assis sur un banc. L’agresseur errait dans la gare avant de se diriger vers lui et de lui porter un coup à la jugulaire à l’aide d’un couteau de cuisine. Il a pris la fuite et il est actuellement recherché. De type européen, il était vêtu d’un T-shirt bleu au moment de l’agression.
L’enquête a été confiée à la police judiciaire parisienne.
Sur Twitter, le ministre de l’Intérieur Gérald Darmanin a dit suivre la situation de près, avec la préfecture de police.
entry.summary: Un homme muni d’une arme blanche a grièvement blessé une personne avant de prendre la fuite, dimanche vers 17h, à la gare du Nord à Paris, a appris l’AFP auprès de la préfecture de police de Paris. La victime est de nationalité afghane et demandeur d’asile en France, a indiqué une source policière. Elle a été transportée en milieu hospitalier avec un «pronostic vital engagé», selon les pompiers. Les motifs de cette agression n’étaient pas connus dimanche en début de soirée, selon la préfecture. Selon Le Parisien, la victime est un demandeur d’asile afghan né en 1988 qui attendait son train assis sur un banc. L’agresseur errait dans la gare avant de se diriger vers lui et de lui porter un coup à la jugulaire à l’aide d’un couteau de cuisine. Il a pris la fuite et il est actuellement recherché. De type européen, il était vêtu d’un T-shirt bleu au moment de l’agression. L’enquête a été confiée à la police judiciaire parisienne. Sur Twitter, le ministre de l’Intérieur Gérald Darmanin a dit suivre la situation de près, avec la préfecture de police.

entry.title: IDI Aceh Usul PSBB

link.title: IDI Aceh Usul PSBB

entry.content:
BANDA ACEH, KOMPAS.TV- Ikatan Dokter Indonesia (IDI) Wilayah Aceh usulkan Pembatasan Sosial Berskala Sosial (PSBB) untuk Aceh.
IDI Aceh telah mengajukan tiga rekomendasi pembatasan bertahap kepada Pemerintah Aceh untuk mencegah penyebaran covid 19.
Pengusulan tiga rekomendasi yang harus segera dilakukan antara lain pembatasan aktivitas dimulai dengan gerakan bekerja di rumah, pemberlakuan jam malam, dan pembatasan sosial berskala besar atau PSBB.
Ketua IDI Aceh, Dr dr Safrizal Rahman SpOT menilai rekomendasi tersebut mampu mengurangi penularan kasus di tengah masyarakat Aceh. Usulan yang disampaikan kepada pemerintah Aceh tersebut bukan tanpa sebab, dimana kasus positif covid 19 di Aceh semakin meningkat, tidak hanya masyarakat, tren kasus positif juga meningkat dikalangan para medis.
"Masyarakat kami harapkan terus menjaga kesehatan mengikuti protokol kesehatan, sehingga dapat mecegah terjadinya penularan kepada orang yang rentan terhadap virus covid 19," Jelas Safrijal
Sebelumnya IDI Aceh memberikan surat rekomendasi kepada Pemerintah Aceh bernomor 594/IDIACEH/VIII/2020 yang diteken Ketua IDI Aceh, beserta 22 ketua IDI cabang kabupaten/kota di Aceh.
Hingga Kamis (03/09/2020) data dari dinas kesehatan Provinsi Aceh mencatat kasus positif di Aceh mencapai 1.793 kasus, dirawat 1.021 kasus, 700 diantaranya telah sembuh serta 72 kasus meninggal dunia.
#aceh #psbb #covid19
entry.summary: BANDA ACEH, KOMPAS.TV- Ikatan Dokter Indonesia (IDI) Wilayah Aceh usulkan Pembatasan Sosial Berskala Sosial (PSBB) untuk Aceh. IDI Aceh telah mengajukan tiga rekomendasi pembatasan bertahap kepada Pemerintah Aceh untuk mencegah penyebaran covid 19. Pengusulan tiga rekomendasi yang harus segera dilakukan antara lain pembatasan aktivitas dimulai dengan gerakan bekerja di rumah, pemberlakuan jam malam, dan pembatasan sosial berskala besar atau PSBB. Ketua IDI Aceh, Dr dr Safrizal Rahman SpOT menilai rekomendasi tersebut mampu mengurangi penularan kasus di tengah masyarakat Aceh. Usulan yang disampaikan kepada pemerintah Aceh tersebut bukan tanpa sebab, dimana kasus positif covid 19 di Aceh semakin meningkat, tidak hanya masyarakat, tren kasus positif juga meningkat dikalangan para medis. "Masyarakat kami harapkan terus menjaga kesehatan mengikuti protokol kesehatan, sehingga dapat mecegah terjadinya penularan kepada orang yang rentan terhadap virus covid 19," Jelas Safrijal Sebelumnya IDI Aceh memberikan surat rekomendasi kepada Pemerintah Aceh bernomor 594/IDIACEH/VIII/2020 yang diteken Ketua IDI Aceh, beserta 22 ketua IDI cabang kabupaten/kota di Aceh. Hingga Kamis (03/09/2020) data dari dinas kesehatan Provinsi Aceh mencatat kasus positif di Aceh mencapai 1.793 kasus, dirawat 1.021 kasus, 700 diantaranya telah sembuh serta 72 kasus meninggal dunia. #aceh #psbb #covid19

Kim Kardashian Gives Birth To Kylie Jenner In Tyga’s New Music Video

entry.title: Başkent’te çevreye ateş açma olayının ardından ünlü cerrah çıktı

link.title: Başkent’te çevreye ateş açma olayının ardından ünlü cerrah çıktı

entry.content:
Arşiv
( ANKARA ) ANKARA
- Başkent’te Perşembe akşamı evinin balkonundan sağa sola ateş etmeye başlayan S.A., emniyet güçlerinin müzakere çalışmaları sonucu cuma sabahı 05.50 sıralarında yakalandı. Olayın arkasında büyük bir dram çıktı. 3 Eylül Perşembe günü saat 22.30 sıralarında Çankaya ilçesinde bir şahsın ikameti içerisinden çevreye ateş ettiği ihbarı üzerine Özel Harekat Timleri’nin acilen bölgeye sevki sonrası şahıs, içerisinde görevli bulunmayan iki resmi ekip otosuna ateş etti. Saatlerce süren ikna çabaları sonrasında şahıs yakalandı. Yakalanan şahsın Türkiye’nin tanınmış cerrahlarından Prof. Dr. Semih Aytuğ olduğu ortaya çıktı. Aytuğ, Emniyet’e verdiği ifadesinde, olay anını bile hatırlamadığını korona virüs nedeniyle psikolojisinin bozulduğunu belirtti.
Olayın ardındaki dram Prof. Dr. Aytuğ’un kızı Başak Aytuğ, 24 Mart 2008 tarihinde babası gibi akademisyen olan annesini öldürmüştü. Ankara Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi Öğretim Üyesi Prof. Dr. Olcay Tiryaki Aytuğ parlak bir kariyere sahipti ve kızı tarafından bıçaklanarak öldürülmüştü. Müebbet hapis cezası alan ve hala ceza evinde olan Başak Aytuğ, ifadesinde cinayeti bir şahsın yönlendirmesi ile işlediğini belirtmişti. (UTK-
entry.summary: Arşiv ( ANKARA ) ANKARA - Başkent’te Perşembe akşamı evinin balkonundan sağa sola ateş etmeye başlayan S.A., emniyet güçlerinin müzakere çalışmaları sonucu cuma sabahı 05.50 sıralarında yakalandı. Olayın arkasında büyük bir dram çıktı. 3 Eylül Perşembe günü saat 22.30 sıralarında Çankaya ilçesinde bir şahsın ikameti içerisinden çevreye ateş ettiği ihbarı üzerine Özel Harekat Timleri’nin acilen bölgeye sevki sonrası şahıs, içerisinde görevli bulunmayan iki resmi ekip otosuna ateş etti. Saatlerce süren ikna çabaları sonrasında şahıs yakalandı. Yakalanan şahsın Türkiye’nin tanınmış cerrahlarından Prof. Dr. Semih Aytuğ olduğu ortaya çıktı. Aytuğ, Emniyet’e verdiği ifadesinde, olay anını bile hatırlamadığını korona virüs nedeniyle psikolojisinin bozulduğunu belirtti. Olayın ardındaki dram Prof. Dr. Aytuğ’un kızı Başak Aytuğ, 24 Mart 2008 tarihinde babası gibi akademisyen olan annesini öldürmüştü. Ankara Üniversitesi Tıp Fakültesi Öğretim Üyesi Prof. Dr. Olcay Tiryaki Aytuğ parlak bir kariyere sahipti ve kızı tarafından bıçaklanarak öldürülmüştü. Müebbet hapis cezası alan ve hala ceza evinde olan Başak Aytuğ, ifadesinde cinayeti bir şahsın yönlendirmesi ile işlediğini belirtmişti. (UTK-

link.title: Home and Away 7402 1st September 2020

entry.content:
Home and Away 7402 1st September 2020
Home and Away 7402 1st September 2020

entry.title: 1,500 Pontian students to benefit from online tuition

link.title: 1,500 Pontian students to benefit from online tuition

entry.content:
About 1,500 Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia (SPM) candidates from seven schools in Pontian, Johor are set to benefit from an online tuition platform that was launched by Tanjung Piai MP Datuk Seri Dr Wee Jeck Seng on Sunday.
The initiative, which covers 14 subjects in the Form Four and Form Five syllabuses, was aimed at preparing the students for the major examination, which had been postponed to January next year due to the Covid-19 pandemic.
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: About 1,500 Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia (SPM) candidates from seven schools in Pontian, Johor are set to benefit from an online tuition platform that was launched by Tanjung Piai MP Datuk Seri Dr Wee Jeck Seng on Sunday. The initiative, which covers 14 subjects in the Form Four and Form Five syllabuses, was aimed at preparing the students for the major examination, which had been postponed to January next year due to the Covid-19 pandemic. entry.title: K4 QUADRADO AZUL - QUINHENTISTA (1990)

link.title: K4 QUADRADO AZUL - QUINHENTISTA (1990)

entry.content:
K4 QUADRADO AZUL :
LISBONNE (PORTUGAL)
1987 - 199
ROCK ALTERNATIF
EP : K4 QUADRADO AZUL (1990)
COMPILATION : FEEDBACK (1990)
Pedro Eloy (claviers)
Hernani Costeira (basse)
Fernando Faustino (chant)
Paulo Neto (batterie)
João Miguel (chant et guitare)
Luís Ferreira (guitare)
Farinha Master
Luis San Payo (batterie)
Jorge Roque
Rui Dâmaso (batterie et percussions)
entry.summary: K4 QUADRADO AZUL : LISBONNE (PORTUGAL) 1987 - 199 ROCK ALTERNATIF EP : K4 QUADRADO AZUL (1990) COMPILATION : FEEDBACK (1990) Pedro Eloy (claviers) Hernani Costeira (basse) Fernando Faustino (chant) Paulo Neto (batterie) João Miguel (chant et guitare) Luís Ferreira (guitare) Farinha Master Luis San Payo (batterie) Jorge Roque Rui Dâmaso (batterie et percussions)
